/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared  -o libinternetcontrol.so CMakeFiles/internetcontrol.dir/internetcontrol_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/internetcontrol.dir/src/InternetControlPlugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/internetcontrol.dir/internetcontrol_autogen/UVLADIE3JM/qrc_resources.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/veyon /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/veyon/libveyon-core.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.13
